title: Repo Séance eval results
description: Artifact emitted by `pnpm evals` (evals/run.ts) and consumed by the site footer at build time. See evals/README.md and SPEC §7.

total.description: Total number of eval cases executed. SPEC §7 requires at least 32.

passed.description: Number of cases that passed. Never greater than `total`.

evidenceCitationRate.description: Fraction (0–1) of rendered evidence refs that resolve to a fixture Dossier entry. The footer formats this as a percentage.

hallucinationCount.description: Count of unsupported or invented claims detected across all cases. Must be 0 for a healthy footer.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the suite produced this artifact.
